typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	folder_path as string,
	input_file_name as string
}
source(output(
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		REQUISITION_NO as string,
		REQ_REV as string,
		REQ_CREATED_DATE as string,
		REQ_ORIGINATOR as string,
		REQ_APPROVER as string,
		RELEASED_TO_PROC as string,
		PROC_ACK_DATE as string,
		MATL_WRK_GRP as string,
		MATL_WRK_DESC as string,
		PO_NUMBER as string,
		PO_REV as string,
		PO_TITLE as string,
		PO_STATUS as string,
		STATUS_DATE as string,
		REV0_PO_ISSUE_DATE as string,
		PO_APPROVED_DATE as string,
		PO_ISSUE_DATE as string,
		SUPPLIER_CODE as string,
		SUPPLIER_NAME as string,
		SUPPLIER_LOCATION as string,
		PURCHASER as string,
		BUYER as string,
		SELECT_CODE as string,
		PAYMENT_MODE as string,
		ITEMS_COUNT_PO as string,
		PO_TOTAL_WITHOUT_TAX as string,
		TOTAL_COST_PO as string,
		CURRENCY_PO as string,
		TOTAL_IN_USD as string,
		ACCOUNT_CODE_PO as string,
		REQ_BUDGET as string,
		AGREEMENT_BUDGET as string,
		REVISION_0_PO_VALUE_IN_USD as string,
		PROJECT_TITLE as string,
		LAST_MODIFIED_PR as string,
		LAST_MODIFIED_PO as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	wildcardPaths:[($folder_path+'/'+$input_file_name+'_*.csv')]) ~> srcSMATStage
srcSMATStage derive(File_Path = concat(concat(trim(substringIndex(File_Path,'/',4),'/'),'/'),substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$input_file_name,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		REQUISITION_NO as string,
		REQ_REV as string,
		REQ_CREATED_DATE as string,
		REQ_ORIGINATOR as string,
		REQ_APPROVER as string,
		RELEASED_TO_PROC as string,
		PROC_ACK_DATE as string,
		MATL_WRK_GRP as string,
		MATL_WRK_DESC as string,
		PO_NUMBER as string,
		PO_REV as string,
		PO_TITLE as string,
		PO_STATUS as string,
		STATUS_DATE as string,
		REV0_PO_ISSUE_DATE as string,
		PO_APPROVED_DATE as string,
		PO_ISSUE_DATE as string,
		SUPPLIER_CODE as string,
		SUPPLIER_NAME as string,
		SUPPLIER_LOCATION as string,
		PURCHASER as string,
		BUYER as string,
		SELECT_CODE as string,
		PAYMENT_MODE as string,
		ITEMS_COUNT_PO as string,
		PO_TOTAL_WITHOUT_TAX as string,
		TOTAL_COST_PO as string,
		CURRENCY_PO as string,
		TOTAL_IN_USD as string,
		ACCOUNT_CODE_PO as string,
		REQ_BUDGET as string,
		AGREEMENT_BUDGET as string,
		REVISION_0_PO_VALUE_IN_USD as string,
		PROJECT_TITLE as string,
		LAST_MODIFIED_PR as string,
		LAST_MODIFIED_PO as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string
	),
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkSMATRaw
